articles.title: Red Sox took advantage of MLB’s new automated strike challenge rules on Opening Day
articles.description:
“It can turn the game around, or has the ability to."

The post Red Sox took advantage of MLB’s new automated strike challenge rules on Opening Day  appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox utilized new automated strike challenge rules on Opening Day, March 30, 2026.
The new rules allow players to challenge up to three calls per game.
Local fans may see more accurate calls, potentially changing game outcomes.

articles.title: Boston College hires UConn assistant Luke Murray, son of actor Bill Murray, as basketball coach
articles.description:
Murray, the son of actor Bill Murray, replaces Earl Grant, who was fired earlier this month after the Eagles had a losing record in four of his five seasons.

The post Boston College hires UConn assistant Luke Murray, son of actor Bill Murray, as basketball coach appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston College hires Luke Murray as new basketball coach effective immediately.
Murray replaces Earl Grant, who had a losing record in four of five seasons.
Local fans hope Murray's leadership will improve team performance and community engagement.
